---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that doesn't work as expected
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps or a minimal command sequence that triggers the problem:

```
# e.g.
echo "$HOME"/*
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (include exact output, and any error messages).

## Environment

- nshell version (`nshell --version`):
- OS / architecture:
- Terminal emulator:

## Additional context

Anything else that might help (config, screenshots, etc.).
